entries.claim_text: AutoMem: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill
entries.quoted_snippet: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill

entries.claim_text: arXiv preprint (2607.01224v1)
entries.quoted_snippet: arXiv preprint: de-anonymized, authors shown
Submitted on 1 Jul 2026

entries.claim_text: Shengguang Wu, Hao Zhu, Yuhui Zhang, Xiaohan Wang, Serena Yeung-Levy (Stanford University)
entries.quoted_snippet: Shengguang Wu \quad Hao Zhu \quad Yuhui Zhang \quad Xiaohan Wang \quad Serena Yeung-Levy

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/autoLearnMem/AutoMem
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/autoLearnMem/AutoMem

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: neurips_2026

entries.claim_text: AutoMem 記憶技能優化的整體成效
entries.quoted_snippet: progressively improves performance through \textit{memory scaffold optimization}

entries.claim_text: AutoMem 概觀：兩個自動化外層迴圈優化一個共用的內層 agent
entries.quoted_snippet: Two automated outer loops optimize a shared inner-loop agent that uses the file system as its memory.

entries.claim_text: NetHack 記憶檔演化
entries.quoted_snippet: Scaffold optimization replaces this with a coordinate-keyed \texttt{<|UPSERT\_MAP|>} deduplication format

entries.claim_text: scaffold 優化對遊戲與記憶行為的影響
entries.quoted_snippet: redundant writes drop sharply ($-$68 to $-$83\%)

entries.claim_text: Crafter 三階段代表性 episode：v0 只收集木材（9%）、演化 scaffold 合成石製工具/建熔爐/採鐵礦（55%）、再訓練 specialist 兼顧進食（59%）
entries.quoted_snippet: the base agent only gathers wood; the evolved scaffold crafts stone tools, builds a furnace, and mines iron; and the trained specialist reaches that same crafting tier while also feeding itself ($9\to55\to59\%$ progression)

entries.claim_text: MiniHack Corridor-R3 三階段代表性 episode：v0 與演化 scaffold 均到不了樓梯（0%/0%），再訓練 specialist 穿過走廊解出任務（100%）
entries.quoted_snippet: neither the base nor the evolved scaffold reaches the staircase, whereas the trained specialist solves the task ($0\to0\to100\%$)

entries.claim_text: NetHack 三階段代表性 episode（單局值）：v0 死於 experience level 1（0%）、演化 scaffold 存活上千步達 level 2（1.85%）、再訓練 specialist 達 level 4（2.42%）
entries.quoted_snippet: the base agent dies at experience level~1 within a few hundred steps; the evolved scaffold survives thousands of steps and reaches experience level~2; and the trained specialist survives far longer and reaches experience level~4 ($0\to1.85\to2.42\%$ progression)

entries.claim_text: 和前面主表的跨 episode 聚合平均（Crafter 10、MiniHack 40、NetHack 5 局）是兩回事
entries.quoted_snippet: traces, for each environment, a representative episode at each optimization stage

entries.claim_text: 演化後的 scaffold 把地圖與物品欄整理到足以合成石製工具、建造熔爐、開採鐵礦
entries.quoted_snippet: the evolved scaffold crafts stone tools, builds a furnace, and mines iron

entries.claim_text: 演化後 scaffold 探索得更遠但仍耗盡 step 上限、到不了樓梯
entries.quoted_snippet: both the base and the evolved scaffold exhaust the step budget without reaching it

entries.claim_text: 角色等級 1→2→4 的階梯
entries.quoted_snippet: the trained specialist survives far longer and reaches experience level~4

entries.claim_text: 大型語言模型的 context window 就是它的工作記憶
entries.quoted_snippet: context window plays the role of working memory, \emph{i.e.,} a fixed-size buffer that bounds what the model can attend to at once

entries.claim_text: 記憶管理本身是一種可以訓練的技能
entries.quoted_snippet: memory management is an active, trainable skill

entries.claim_text: 論文主張記憶技能沿兩個軸進步
entries.quoted_snippet: This memory skill improves along two axes: the \textbf{\textit{structure}} that supports it (prompts, file schemas, action vocabulary)

entries.claim_text: 如何衡量成功？作者選了三個程序生成
entries.quoted_snippet: optimizing memory alone---without modifying the model's task-action weights---the full \methodname{} framework yields ${\sim}2\times$--$4\times$ gains over the base agent

entries.claim_text: 按 v0 到完整 AutoMem 逐環境重算，Crafter、MiniHack、NetHack 分別為 2.05×、4.00×、4.40×
entries.quoted_snippet: memory-as-file-system, \texttt{v0}      & 25.00 \pms{5.50} &  7.50 \pms{4.16} & 0.42 \pms{0.37}

entries.claim_text: 內層迴圈就是一顆 LLM agent 跑一個 episode，配一個磁碟上的目錄當外部記憶
entries.quoted_snippet: equipped with a directory of files on disk that serves as its external memory

entries.claim_text: agent 決定要不要記錄環境對上一動作的回應
entries.quoted_snippet: the agent decides whether and how to record the environment's response to the previous action

entries.claim_text: 論文把兩個迴圈統一成一個熟悉的機器學習形式
entries.quoted_snippet: mirrors the familiar structure of machine learning

entries.claim_text: \theta_{\text{struct}} \leftarrow \theta_{\text{struct}} + \nabla L_{\text{struct}}
entries.quoted_snippet: in the first loop $\theta$ is the agent scaffold and $\nabla L$ is a code revision, while in the second, $\theta$ is the dedicated memory model weights

entries.claim_text: 只有平均 progression 嚴格超過前一版才保留
entries.quoted_snippet: A revision is accepted only if its average progression on the same fixed eval seeds strictly exceeds the previous iteration's.

entries.claim_text: 挑哪些回應值得強化，而非當 teacher 生成新答案
entries.quoted_snippet: the meta-LLM's role is to select which responses to reinforce---it thus acts as a \textbf{\textit{filter}} on the model's own behavior rather than as a \textbf{\textit{teacher}} generating new responses.

entries.claim_text: 它的權重從未被 finetune 碰過
entries.quoted_snippet: the base model's competence at producing well-formatted world actions is fully preserved

entries.claim_text: 引入一個 `<|UPSERT_MAP|>` 操作，改成座標鍵去重
entries.quoted_snippet: The optimizer introduces a dedicated \texttt{<|UPSERT\_MAP|>} operation that replaces append-based map logging with coordinate-keyed deduplication

entries.claim_text: 138 字元降到 6 字元，減少 95%
entries.quoted_snippet: its per-step growth falls from 138 to 6 characters, a 95\% reduction.

entries.claim_text: frontier 數字取自 BALROG 排行榜
entries.quoted_snippet: Frontier numbers are taken from the BALROG leaderboard~\citep{paglieri2024balrog}; baseline rows for \qwen{} use the same BALROG harness

entries.claim_text: 該 sliding-window baseline 只保留最近 16 步的 observation，可搭配或不搭配 chain-of-thought
entries.quoted_snippet: under the BALROG harness with basic context-management methods: a sliding window of $16$-step recent observations with/without chain-of-thought

entries.claim_text: NetHack 的 $10^4$–$10^5$ 步 episode 確實遠超任何 context window
entries.quoted_snippet: with 200+ actions and $10^4$--$10^5$ steps per episode

entries.claim_text: Gemini/Claude 的數字取自 BALROG 排行榜的「vanilla」設定
entries.quoted_snippet: bring the 32B open-weight model to the performance level of frontier proprietary systems

entries.claim_text: 每個數字都在固定的 10 個 eval seeds `[42..51]` 上評估
entries.quoted_snippet: We report mean and standard error over a fixed list of 10 seeds, $[42, 43, \ldots, 51]$

entries.claim_text: 實際評估 episode 數依環境而異——Crafter 10、MiniHack 40（8 個 task 各跑 5）、NetHack 5
entries.quoted_snippet: paired with per-environment episode counts: 10 episodes for Crafter, 5 per task for MiniHack ($5 \times 8 = 40$ episodes), and 5 for NetHack, matching the BALROG defaults.

entries.claim_text: 所謂「追到 frontier」在 NetHack 上是 1.85% 對 2.0–2.6%
entries.quoted_snippet: comparable to Claude-Opus-4.5 (Crafter/MiniHack/NetHack: 49.5/27.5/2.0)

entries.claim_text: scaffold 優化的接受門檻用的是同一組 eval seeds
entries.quoted_snippet: Seeds are drawn randomly and explicitly disjoint from the 10 evaluation seeds $[42, \ldots, 51]$, so no train/eval seed contamination is possible.

entries.claim_text: scaffold loop 讓 frontier meta-LLM 讀完整軌跡後改寫程式碼、prompt、檔案 schema 與記憶 action surface
entries.quoted_snippet: the meta-LLM analyzes full trajectories and iteratively optimizes the agent's memory scaffold

entries.claim_text: AutoMem 比較的是自己的 file-system-memory v0 與 sliding-window context baseline，不是成熟的 retrieval stack
entries.quoted_snippet: a sliding window of $16$-step recent observations with/without chain-of-thought

entries.claim_text: 驅動兩個迴圈的 meta-LLM 是 Claude Opus 4.6 / 4.7 配 `--effort max`
entries.quoted_snippet: The scaffold optimizer (Outer-loop~\#1) and the training engine (Outer-loop~\#2) call Claude Opus~4.6 \& Opus~4.7 respectively as the meta-LLM.

entries.claim_text: 記憶是 **episodic**（每 episode 從零開始，不跨 episode 持久化）
entries.quoted_snippet: the memory we study is \textit{episodic}: the file system starts fresh at the beginning of each episode
